name: Glenn Grothman
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $348,728 for Glenn Grothman in U.S. House, WI-06. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
